[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001111 5
1 0000001111 4
2 1011100111 7
3 0111111111 9
4 1001110010 5
5 1111011011 8
6 1111111111 a
7 1111111111 a
